name: Documentation Auto-Fixer
description: Detects and interactively repairs front-matter, markdown lint, and structural issues in docs — always with permission gates before changing content

defaults.appliesTo: Inferred from path: 05_Projects/<name> → project name, else 'Bornara AI'

instructions.primary: When asked to fix documentation, ALWAYS show the proposed change and ask for confirmation before modifying any file. Auto-fix is only permitted for purely structural markdown issues (blank lines, trailing spaces, etc). Front-matter field values require explicit approval.
workflow: 1. Scan the target files (staged only vs all docs)
3. For safe issues: explain what will be changed, offer to run markdownlint-cli2 --fix
4. For front-matter issues: show each file with proposed defaults side-by-side
5. Ask: 'Fix all / Fix this one / Edit fields / Skip' — never assume yes
6. Apply approved fixes, re-stage if in pre-commit context
7. Re-run validators to confirm clean state
8. Report summary: X fixed, Y skipped, Z still need attention
instructions.responseTemplate:
When reporting issues, always format as:
📄 path/to/file.md
   Missing: Owner:, Applies To:
   Proposed:
     Owner:        Mahdi Moradi
     Applies To:   Bornara AI
   → Apply? (y/n/e)
